hero.desc: Crafting interfaces that don't just work — they feel right. React, Next.js & TypeScript with a designer's eye.

about.label: My Story
about.text1: I started in tech over 9 years ago, and for the last 5 I've focused entirely on front-end — the layer where logic becomes experience. Born in Brazil, currently living in Milan, Italy, working with teams across Europe and LATAM.
about.text2: Today I lead front-end at Capgemini, building a streaming platform for the Portuguese Ministry of Health. I also act as UI/UX designer, creating Figma prototypes and turning them into pixel-perfect interfaces.

skills.title:
What I
build with
skills.subtitle: A toolkit forged through real projects, real teams, and real deadlines.

experience.label: Career
experience.intro: From early projects to enterprise-scale platforms — each role sharpened my skills and expanded my perspective.

blog.subtitle: On tech, design, career and life as a dev in Europe.

together
contact.text: Open to full remote roles across Europe and LATAM. Got a project that needs a developer with a designer's eye? Let's talk.
